commit.message:
Enable auto-vectorization of add/mul reduction loops on NEON

On NEON, this patch enables auto-vectorization of sum and product
reduction loops, thus enabling vectorization of several BLAS functions.
In particular, this patch adds strict-order NEON reduction instructions
for `AddReductionV{F|D}` operations and it unblocks `MulReductionV{F|D}`
operations.  Previously, `match_rule_supported_auto_vectorization()`
blocked these operations, preventing vectorization of reduction loops
that are common in dot products, matrix-vector multiplications, and
matrix-matrix multiplications.  Additionally, this patch also adds
`UseSVE` guards to existing SVE reduction predicates so that they're not
matched on NEON-only hardware.  The sequential nature of the strict
order reductions preseves JLS semantics, so this patch doesn't impact
correctness.
